name: Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10.5 oz) cream of mushroom soup
1 can (10.5 oz) cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a bowl.
2. Combine the melted margarine with the stuffing mix and diluted mushroom soup using 1 cup of chicken broth.
3. Place half of the mixture in a 9 x 13 baking dish.
4. Layer the cooked chicken breasts on top.
5. Pour the remaining mushroom soup, which has been diluted with another cup of chicken broth, over the chicken.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 1 hour.
Modifications:
- Becky Hurt Coleman uses 8 oz Pepperidge Farm cornbread or Herb Seasoning as a stuffing mix.
- Lida Hendrickson mixes evaporated milk with her soup and combines it with Stove Top stuffing mixed with chicken broth.
